title: 10 best herbal creams for high blood pressure
description: Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, creams helps with high blood pressure because it contains adaptogenic compounds that help the body adapt to stress. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties help relax blood vessels, improving blood flow and reducing pressure. Additionally, ashwagandha's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress, a contributing factor to high blood pressure.
